archetype: Archetype 5: Luxury (Editorial / Old Money Tech Variant)
design_philosophy: Architectural Digest meets modern marketplace. A typography-forward, magazine-style editorial experience. High contrast, tactile backgrounds, and asymmetrical grids. The tone is authoritative, curated, and highly opinionated. No generic real estate UI.

rules: Headlines MUST use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter) and leading-none.
Use explicit serif font for all H1, H2, and H3.
Labels and overlines must be Uppercase, Tiny, and Wide Spaced (tracking-[0.2em]).
Body text should be 16px to 18px for comfortable long-form reading (leading-relaxed).

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-serif tracking-tighter text-[#1A1A1A]
scale.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-serif tracking-tight text-[#1A1A1A]
scale.overline: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#4A4A4A]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs. Use p-8, p-12, p-16.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: The 'Tetris' Bento Grid for property displays. Asymmetrical, editorial layouts. Mix wide span cards with narrow tall cards.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-sm (Keep it sharp, architectural, max 4px radius)

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white hover:bg-[#2C4033] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-sans uppercase tracking-widest text-xs
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white hover:bg-[#1DA851] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-sans font-medium flex items-center gap-2
buttons.outline: border border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-sans uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.property: bg-white border border-[#D1CEC7] rounded-sm overflow-hidden flex flex-col group
cards.editorial_review: bg-[#EAE6DF] border-l-4 border-[#2C4033] p-8 md:p-12 relative

components.inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-[#D1CEC7] rounded-none px-0 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#1A1A1A] focus:ring-0 w-full transition-colors font-sans
components.badges: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 bg-[#F9F8F6] border border-[#D1CEC7] text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-sans text-[#1A1A1A]

homepage.hero: Split layout. Left: Editorial H1 ('Curated Spaces. Honest Reviews.'), overline, primary CTA. Right: Large architectural hero image. Background: #F9F8F6.
homepage.search_bar: Minimalist sticky bar overlapping the bottom of the hero. Input for location, Select dropdown for Rent/Short Stay, and a bold search button.
homepage.locations: Bento grid of cities. Dark overlays (bg-black/30) over location images with white serif text centered.
homepage.listings: Masonry/Asymmetrical grid of property cards. Include 'Rent' or 'Short Stay' badges.

property_detail.layout: Two columns. Left (65%): Image Gallery (1 large, 2 small bento style), Description, 'Real Ratings Review'. Right (35%): Sticky sidebar with price, contact form, WhatsApp button.
property_detail.editorial_review_block: A distinct visual block (bg-[#EAE6DF]). Must include Ari's grayscale portrait, an italic serif quote, a star rating, and a clear 'Pros / Cons' list.
property_detail.chat_room: Real-time chat UI placed below the main content. Clean UI, requires Google Login to post. Distinguish admin (Ari) messages visually (e.g., subtle green bg).

admin_dashboard.layout: 'Control Room' grid. Dense, highly functional. Sidebar navigation (dark #1A1A1A bg, white text).
admin_dashboard.content: Tables for properties (Shadcn UI), Inbox for contact forms, Moderation queue for chat/submissions. Use strict Shadcn components here for utility.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images inside cards must scale up slightly (scale-105) on hover with smooth transition. Buttons invert colors.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling if possible. Fade-in-up animations for property cards using framer-motion.

rules: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

images.description: White modern architectural home with pool, used for main hero section.
Modern house with pool and lounge chairs.
Modern living room with a large window.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' fonts from Google Fonts.
Implement the UI using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI (specifically tailored to match the custom colors/borders).
Ensure all data-testids are added to inputs, buttons, and navigable elements.
For the Real Ratings Review block, explicitly render 'Reviewed by Ari' and use the reviewer_portrait URL provided.
Use the exact color codes provided for the editorial theme.
The layout must heavily utilize negative space and asymmetrical grid columns.
